acknowledgements.title: Acknowledgements
acknowledgements.description: AgentKit exists thanks to a lot of open‑source work and generous people.

agent-determinism.title: Deterministic setups for agents (and humans)
agent-determinism.description: AgentKit helps agents and humans converge on the same deterministic setup — which saves tokens and time.

agents-md.title: Example AGENTS.md
agents-md.description: Below is a sample AGENTS.md that orients an AI coding agent to the AgentKit ecosystem (with a little sarcastic soul).

debugging.title: Debugging
debugging.description: When something fails, you want deterministic evidence.

flow.title: Flow UI
flow.description: The Flow UI is an OpenClaw accessibility tool — a visual builder for node‑based flows that can be executed via the OpenClaw gateway.

getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.description: AgentKit helps agents install capabilities without guessing commands.

index.title: AgentKit
index.description: A package manager for agent capabilities.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: AgentKit is a capability package manager for AI coding agents. It turns “guess and check” installs into deterministic, reusable recipes.

quickstart.title: Quickstart
quickstart.description: Get from zero to a working capability in ~60 seconds.

registry.title: Registry
registry.description: This page groups the live registry by category.

registry-schema.title: Registry Schema
registry-schema.description: The registry index is a YAML file listing available recipes.

support.title: Support
support.description: Thanks for supporting AgentKit — it helps keep the project moving fast and open.

token-savings.description: When agents guess installs, they burn tokens on:

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Nothing happens when I run agentkit add

workflows.title: Workflows > Packages
workflows.description: AgentKit’s real value is multi‑step workflows. Anyone can install a package; AgentKit makes the whole setup repeatable.
